{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.2": 3, "R1.4": 2, "RX.1": 1, "RX.3": 3, "RX.4": 3, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "Identifies one consistency issue (coupling mechanism as objective vs constraint) but doesn't fully resolve it.",
    "R1.4": "Names prior work (RL approaches) but lacks specific contrast with the proposed method.",
    "RX.1": "All output presented as equally confident, no uncertainty disclosure for claims made.",
    "RX.3": "Mostly within scope, but misses tracing of changes made to the original draft.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions identified, maintains factual accuracy of the original text.",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites are not traced; minor edits lack source and reason annotations."
  },
  "confidence": {"R1.2": 0.8, "R1.4": 0.7, "RX.1": 0.9, "RX.3": 0.6, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.7},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: Identifies one consistency issue (coupling mechanism as objective vs constraint) but doesn't fully resolve it.
rationale.R1.4: Names prior work (RL approaches) but lacks specific contrast with the proposed method.
rationale.RX.1: All output presented as equally confident, no uncertainty disclosure for claims made.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope, but misses tracing of changes made to the original draft.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions identified, maintains factual accuracy of the original text.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are not traced; minor edits lack source and reason annotations.
